For Local Businesses Everywhere

The First Business to Answer Gets the Job.

Your missed calls, unanswered texts, and ignored follow-ups are sending customers to whoever shows up next. The Client Capture Engine fixes all three, in about a week.

Get a Free Custom Video Breakdown See How It Works

Where Local Businesses Lose Work Every Week

None of these problems show up on a report. They are just jobs you never knew you missed.

Missed Calls, No Follow-Up

Every call you cannot answer while you are busy is a lead that moves on. The average business takes over 47 hours to follow up on a new inquiry. By then, the customer has already booked.

Quotes That Go Cold

You sent the estimate. They said they would think about it. Most businesses follow up once, maybe twice, then write the lead off. But 80% of sales take five or more follow-ups to close.

No System for Reviews

You do good work. Your customers know it. But you never ask at the right time, so reviews do not stack up, and businesses with more stars on Google keep winning the search.

The Client Capture Engine

Three Things Running Automatically in the Background

One system, built for you, that handles missed calls, lead follow-up, and review generation without adding anything to your plate.

1

Missed Call Text-Back

Any call you cannot answer gets an automatic text back in under 60 seconds, on a local number with your area code. The customer knows someone is there before they even find the next shop to call.

2

Instant Lead Response + Follow-Up

New leads and quote requests get an immediate response. Then a follow-up sequence runs automatically over the next 10 to 14 days. Text, email, at timed intervals. No lead goes cold because no one remembered to follow up.

3

Automatic Review Requests

After a job is done, a short review request goes out by text. Easy to tap, takes 30 seconds. Most businesses go from a handful of reviews to dozens within the first few months.

See the Full System

Built for Businesses That Work With Their Hands

The problem is the same across industries. The first business to respond wins most of the work.

Machine Shops & Fabricators

Everyone on the floor means calls go to voicemail and RFQs sit in an unchecked inbox. Buyers choose the shop that responds first.

See how it works →

Med Spas & Aesthetics

Consult requests that go unanswered for hours, no-shows that could have been prevented, and clients who book once and never come back.

See how it works →

Contractors & Home Services

Missed calls while you are on jobs, leads that go cold in hours, and no engine for stacking up Google reviews.

See how it works →

Free Course, No Email Required

See Exactly How the System Works

The Client Capture Crash Course: six short lessons with diagrams covering missed call text-back, speed to lead, follow-up sequences, reviews, reactivation, and no-show recovery.

Start the Free Course

The Numbers Behind the Problem

21x

Businesses that respond within 5 minutes are 21x more likely to qualify a lead than those who wait 30 minutes.

Harvard Business Review, 2011 (study of 2,241 companies)

80%

80% of sales require five or more follow-up attempts to close. 44% of businesses give up after the first try.

Invesp, customer follow-up research

93%

93% of consumers say online reviews influence their purchasing decisions. Reviews are part of the sales process now.

BrightLocal Consumer Review Survey, 2023

Ready to Stop Losing Jobs to Whoever Answers First?
